TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Coraf / Malikat / Mailoh / Todoh Toloay a sakalikat no namal ‚ÄĒ‚ÄĒ o mamalikat , o sapalikat , ato o kalikatan no kasoy . O mamalikat hananay i, oya mamalikat a kasoy, mato ca'ang no kilang, ano eca^, o 'awol . O sapalikat hananay i, oya mirorohay to sakalikat no kasoy, mato yang-ci^ a fali^ . O kalikatan hananay i, o katangasaan to ko faedet no kasoy ta malikat. O kalikatan no kalomaamaan i, caay ka lead. Poener ko kalikatan, saka raho:day a malikat; o roma^i, takaraw ko kalikatan, saka caay ko rahoday a malikat. Caay ka likat ko ma^ta'ay a calang, naw han i, mahedot no nanom ko faedet no kilang, orasaka o tatongalaen ko namal ta malalahod kora nanom. O ma'icangay a ca'ang i, mara:wis ko kalikatan, saka narikay a malikat.
S.PHON: ¶o~uraf / ma…ĺikat / mai…ĺo~uńß / to~u…¨~…ģo~uńß to~u…ĺo~uaj a saka…ĺikat no~u nama…ĺ ** o~u mama…ĺikat , o~u sapa…ĺikat , ato~u o~u ka…ĺikatan no~u kaso~uj . o~u mama…ĺikat ńßananaj i, o~uja mama…ĺikat a kaso~uj, mato~u ¶a °aŇč no~u ki…ĺaŇč, ano~u …ô ¶a Ē, o~u °awo~u…ĺ . o~u sapa…ĺikat ńßananaj i, o~uja miro~uro~uńßaj to~u saka…ĺikat no~u kaso~uj, mato~u jaŇč- ¶i Ē a fa…ĺi Ē . o~u ka…ĺikatan ńßananaj i, o~u kataŇčasaan to~u ko~u fa…ô…¨~…ģ…ôt no~u kaso~uj ta ma…ĺikat. o~u ka…ĺikatan no~u ka…ĺo~umaamaan i, ¶aaj ka …ĺ…ôa…¨~…ģ. po~u…ôn…ôr ko~u ka…ĺikatan, saka rańßo~u:…¨~…ģaj a ma…ĺikat; o~u ro~uma Ēi, takaraw ko~u ka…ĺikatan, saka ¶aaj ko~u rańßo~u…¨~…ģaj a ma…ĺikat. ¶aaj ka …ĺikat ko~u ma Ēta °aj a ¶a…ĺaŇč, naw ńßan i, mańß…ô…¨~…ģo~ut no~u nano~um ko~u fa…ô…¨~…ģ…ôt no~u ki…ĺaŇč, o~urasaka o~u tato~uŇča…ĺa…ôn ko~u nama…ĺ ta ma…ĺa…ĺańßo~u…¨~…ģ ko~ura nano~um. o~u ma °i ¶aŇčaj a ¶a °aŇč i, mara:wis ko~u ka…ĺikatan, saka narikaj a ma…ĺikat.
S.FORM: Coraf / Malikat / Mailoh / Todoh Toloay a sakalikat no namal ‚ÄĒ‚ÄĒ o mamalikat , o sapalikat , ato o kalikatan no kasoy . O mamalikat hananay i, oya mamalikat a kasoy, mato ca'ang no kilang, ano eca^, o 'awol . O sapalikat hananay i, oya mirorohay to sakalikat no kasoy, mato yang-ci^ a fali^ . O kalikatan hananay i, o katangasaan to ko faedet no kasoy ta malikat. O kalikatan no kalomaamaan i, caay ka lead. Poener ko kalikatan, saka raho:day a malikat; o roma^i, takaraw ko kalikatan, saka caay ko rahoday a malikat. Caay ka likat ko ma^ta'ay a calang, naw han i, mahedot no nanom ko faedet no kilang, orasaka o tatongalaen ko namal ta malalahod kora nanom. O ma'icangay a ca'ang i, mara:wis ko kalikatan, saka narikay a malikat.
S.PHON: ¶o~uraf / ma…ĺikat / mai…ĺo~uńß / to~u…¨~…ģo~uńß to~u…ĺo~uaj a saka…ĺikat no~u nama…ĺ ** o~u mama…ĺikat , o~u sapa…ĺikat , ato~u o~u ka…ĺikatan no~u kaso~uj . o~u mama…ĺikat ńßananaj i, o~uja mama…ĺikat a kaso~uj, mato~u ¶a °aŇč no~u ki…ĺaŇč, ano~u …ô ¶a Ē, o~u °awo~u…ĺ . o~u sapa…ĺikat ńßananaj i, o~uja miro~uro~uńßaj to~u saka…ĺikat no~u kaso~uj, mato~u jaŇč- ¶i Ē a fa…ĺi Ē . o~u ka…ĺikatan ńßananaj i, o~u kataŇčasaan to~u ko~u fa…ô…¨~…ģ…ôt no~u kaso~uj ta ma…ĺikat. o~u ka…ĺikatan no~u ka…ĺo~umaamaan i, ¶aaj ka …ĺ…ôa…¨~…ģ. po~u…ôn…ôr ko~u ka…ĺikatan, saka rańßo~u:…¨~…ģaj a ma…ĺikat; o~u ro~uma Ēi, takaraw ko~u ka…ĺikatan, saka ¶aaj ko~u rańßo~u…¨~…ģaj a ma…ĺikat. ¶aaj ka …ĺikat ko~u ma Ēta °aj a ¶a…ĺaŇč, naw ńßan i, mańß…ô…¨~…ģo~ut no~u nano~um ko~u fa…ô…¨~…ģ…ôt no~u ki…ĺaŇč, o~urasaka o~u tato~uŇča…ĺa…ôn ko~u nama…ĺ ta ma…ĺa…ĺańßo~u…¨~…ģ ko~ura nano~um. o~u ma °i ¶aŇčaj a ¶a °aŇč i, mara:wis ko~u ka…ĺikatan, saka narikaj a ma…ĺikat.
